response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON for '未来島 -Future Island-' and 'Dancing Reed'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for transcription and timing; adapted the English version of 'Future Island' where Mori Calliope sang English lyrics. 3. Timing & Pacing: Followed the rapid tempo of both songs, using aggressive truncation for line transitions and matching visual title cards for 'Dancing Reed'.
